zh.Lower Saxony, Braunschweig, Niedersachse: 德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Staufen於1162年出生在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維時，她的父親Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I22歲，母親Marie de Boulogne21歲。她於大約1187年與Rudolf II von Habsburg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年2月9日在瑞士阿高勞芬伯格享年90歲。

zh-hans.Lower Saxony, Braunschweig, Niedersachse: 德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Staufen于1162年出生在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維时，她的父亲Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I22岁，母亲Marie de Boulogne21岁。她于大约1187年与Rudolf II von Habsburg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年2月9日在瑞士阿高勞芬伯格享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Staufen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: variant of   Stauffer  . Compare   Stoufer  .

variants.name: Stauffer
meanings: occupational name for a maker or seller of beakers or mugs, from an agent derivative of Middle High German stouf ‘beaker, stoup’.

habitational name for someone from any of various minor places called with this word, for example Stauf, Staufen; the reference is to hills thought to resemble a beaker in shape. Compare   Stouffer  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Staufen was born in 1162, in Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I, was 22 and her mother, Marie de Boulogne, was 21. She married Rudolf II von Habsburg about 1187. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 9 February 1252, in Laufenburg, Aargau, Switzerland, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Staufen est née en 1162, à Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Marie de Boulogne, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Rudolf II von Habsburg environ 1187. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 février 1252, à Laufenburg, Argovie, Suisse, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Staufen 1162 in Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I 22 und ihre Mutter Marie de Boulogne 21. Sie hat um 1187 Rudolf II von Habsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Februar 1252 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Laufenburg, Aargau, Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Staufen è nata il nel 1162 nel Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania, sua padre, Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Marie de Boulogne, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Rudolf II von Habsburg circa 1187. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1252, nel Laufenburg, Argovia, Svizzera, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Staufenが1162年にドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグで生まれた時，父Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen Iは22歳，母Marie de Boulogneは21歳であった。約1187年にRudolf II von Habsburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年2月9日にスイスアールガウラウフエンブルグで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Staufen(이)가 1162년 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Boulogne(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1187년 Rudolf II von Habsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 2월 9일 스위스 아아르가 로펜버그에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Staufen nasceu em 1162, em Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Boulogne, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Rudolf II von Habsburg aproximadamente 1187. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1252, em Laufenburg, Aargau, Suiça, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Staufen родилась в 1162 г. в местности браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Boulogne, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rudolf II von Habsburg около 1187 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 февраля 1252 г. в местности лауфенбург, ааргау, Швейцария в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Staufen nació en 1162, en Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Gottfried Ier Von Staufen I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Marie de Boulogne, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Rudolf II von Habsburg aproximadamente 1187. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1252, en Laufenburg, Aargau, Suiza, a la edad de 90 años.
